stdout_tail: - Did not broaden scope into CLI/daemon audit exposure or durable SQLite-backed audit persistence, since the current tree already has wider unrelated in-flight changes and F19 sub-beads `mb-2db.9.1` / `mb-2db.9.2` are already marked closed.
- The repo already had the audit taxonomy and append-only storage skeleton; the missing value was mutation-path coverage, not schema invention.
- Snapshot operations were especially important because semantic diff and historical introspection already depend on audit/snapshot interplay.
- Forgetting audit rows had dynamic tick-derived `related_run` values, so tests should assert via returned row metadata rather than hard-coded tick assumptions.

- `cargo check --all-targets` is still failing, but due to pre-existing unrelated `membrain-cli` test-scope import errors around dream types in `crates/membrain-cli/src/main.rs:6320` and nearby lines:
